title: Your Toenails Grow Faster Than You Think!
title_full: Your Toenails Grow Faster Than You Think! #Shorts #facts #didyouknow #bodyfacts
description:
How fast do yours grow?

Think your fingernails grow fastest? Think again! Discover the surprising truth about toenail growth rates and why they actually outpace your fingernails. Learn about the science behind it all.
Follow for more!
